character.name: Cute super retro 16-bit pirate with red bandanna, oversized head, tiny stubby body. Classic SNES/GBA RPG overworld sprite. Big round eyes, smirky grin. Dark blue vest with gold buttons, light blue puffy sleeves, brown leather belt, teal knee-length pants, chunky brown boots. Hair peeking out from bandanna. Warm skin tone. Adorable and round, like Pokemon Diamond or Earthbound characters. Simple clean pixel art, not detailed — chunky readable shapes.
